ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Boessenecker for William Wunsch (Petitioner).

Mr. Boessenecker stated that his Client was not making a claim for attorney's fees, explained the extent of services provided and the amount of time spent to support the fee requests, and stated that the amount of fees did not reflect the amount of work his Client performed. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.
